name: procurement managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses processing 10-20 invoices/month tool
description: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes late payments and supplier penalties. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
target_audience: procurement managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses processing 10-20 invoices/month
problem_solved: manual reconciliation of vendor invoices with purchase orders

locked_fields.primary_user: procurement managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses processing 10-20 invoices/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: manual reconciliation of vendor invoices with purchase orders
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes late payments and supplier penalties. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
